title: OAuth token exchange does not require client_secret
description: POST /oauth/token (api.rs:769) only verifies client_id/client_secret 'if provided'. An attacker who intercepts an authorization code (e.g., from browser history, logs, or redirect URL) can exchange it for an access token without knowing the client_secret. The code should require client authentication for confidential clients (those issued a client_secret). This weakens the OAuth security model from two-factor (code + secret) to single-factor (code only).
